67b3c0236aa8a3da38aa80d7.leadin: Name some Irish writers for 10 points each.
67b3c0236aa8a3da38aa80d7.leadin_sanitized: Name some Irish writers for 10 points each.
parts: This satirist wrote about a conflict between the Ancients and the Moderns in his Battle of the Books, but is better known for a satirical Modest Proposal to end hunger by eating Irish children.
This author wrote about Donal Davoren who pretends to be a member of the IRA in The Shadow of a Gunman and Captain Jack Boyle's family in Juno and the Paycock.
This dramatist of The Gaol Gate collected Kiltartanese versions of folktales and cofounded the Abbey Theatre with Yeats.
